name: Moonwalk
overview: Moonwalk follows two thieves, Tarik Pandey and Maddy Kapoor, as they go head-to-head to steal the heart of a local heartthrob, Chandini Lakhani. Their rivalry and competition lead to dangerous yet hilarious consequences and something far more valuable...and out of this world- a piece of rock from the Moon that lands on Earth!

trailers.title: Moonwalk | Official Trailer | Anshumaan Pushkar, Samir Kochhar, Nidhi Singh | JioCinema Premium
